query: SELECT 'users' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users UNION ALL SELECT 'receipts', COUNT(*) FROM receipts UNION ALL SELECT 'transactions', COUNT(*) FROM transactions UNION ALL SELECT 'mileageLogs', COUNT(*) FROM mileage_logs UNION ALL SELECT 'notarySessions', COUNT(*) FROM notary_sessions UNION ALL SELECT 'chatMessages', COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages UNION ALL SELECT 'academyCourses', COUNT(*) FROM academy_courses UNION ALL SELECT 'academyLessons', COUNT(*) FROM academy_lessons ORDER BY cnt DESC;
